Argument Reference

  • compartment_id - (Optional) (Updatable) Move the table to a different compartment.
  • ddl_statement - (Required) (Updatable) Complete CREATE TABLE DDL statement.
  • table_limits - (Optional) Throughput limits for the table.
    • capacity_mode - (Optional) (Updatable) Capacity mode for the table.
    • max_read_units - (Optional) (Updatable) Maximum sustained read throughput.
    • max_storage_in_gbs - (Optional) (Updatable) Maximum storage size.
    • max_write_units - (Optional) (Updatable) Maximum sustained write throughput.
